1.name: Magic Storage Bag
1.description:
A portable magical tool that allows you to carry 
far more items than usual. However, 
even magical tools have their storage limits..
2.name: Senpo
2.description:
A quick step on the ground covers a short distance,
allowing you to dodge some attacks. It’s merely a starting dash 
technique, but the user insists on giving it a cool name
3.name: Senpo Tachi
3.description:
A sword-drawing technique learned from the young Sword Master.
By combining with SenPo, you unleash a speed-enhanced  
strike — enough to knock enemies away if timed right.
3.ability:
Left Click during Senpo: Slash, damage scales with speed
Hold Right Click during Senpo: Charge, effects scale with momentum
3.mobileAbility:
Tap the skill button to slash, damage scales with movement speed
Hold the skill button to charge, effect scales with momentum
4.name: Whirlwind Slash
4.description:
Spin while swinging your weapon to launch continuous attacks. 
The attack speed increases over time. For those who aren't great 
with sword techniques, this move is easy to learn and effective.
4.ability:
Hold Right Click to activate the skill
Cancel during spinning to throw your weapon
4.mobileAbility:
Hold the skill button to activate the skill
Cancel while spinning to throw your weapon
6.name: Lucky Pervert
6.subtitle: true
6.description:
A legendary perverted constitution that activates on its own, 
even without the user realizing it.
As if blessed and guided by an unseen goddess, irresistible forces 
push you into blush-inducing, heart-pounding fanservice scenarios…!
6.ability: Always creates the perfect opportunities to trigger lewd events!
7.name: Danger Sense
7.description:
Often called ‘Mind's Eye’, but it's actually a sense 
sharpened by countless brushes with death.
In other words, more like a trauma reflex than an actual skill...
7.ability: Hover the mouse over the target to view detailed info
7.mobileAbility: Tap the target to view detailed info
9.name: Air king
9.description:
Caves, cliffs, the open sky... he's fallen from just about everywhere.
Even after being battered to the brink of death again and again, 
he always somehow manages to cling to his last breath.
One day, this man will cast off gravity itself and truly conquer the sky...!
9.ability:
When fatal fall damage is taken, forcibly survive with 1 HP
Can trigger at most once per day
10.name: Breath Concealment
10.subtitle: true
10.description:
A ninja technique. I only picked it up in a rush, but…
somehow, I got the hang of it pretty quickly.
10.ability:
Press Shift while active to enter stealth
Reduces the monster's detection range by \c[17]${1+$gameParty.leader().skillMasteryLevel(10)}\c[108] tile
Reduces \str[120]’s alert increase rate during peeking by \c[17]${15+15*$gameParty.leader().skillMasteryLevel(10)}%\c[0]
11.name: Backstab
11.subtitle: true
11.description:
A ninja technique. Can be activated while in stealth
Strike an unguarded enemy from behind for massive damage!
12.name: Musou Burst Stream
12.description:
A secret finisher inherited from ASABA, who embraced sorrow
In an instant too fast for the eye to see, a hundred strikes land—
leaving the enemy with nothing but final darkness!
12.ability:
Skill command:  \{⬆⬇⬅⮕⬆⬇\}
Each use of the skill consumes some HP
15.name: Crossdressing
15.description:
You put on clothes not meant for you… and something inside you 
stirred. No combat bonus—might even mess with your head a little.
Your companions glance oddly, and enemies might pause… maybe.
After all, in this world—cuteness is justice!
15.ability: Increases Sin based on the number of crossdressing items equipped!
16.name: Bladekeepers
16.description:
"No matter how you swing your weapons!" "We’ll rise to call you out!"
"To stop the blades from wearing away!" "To protect the dignity of arms!"
"For we believe the sword is master, and humans are but servants!"
"The most absurd yet unshakable believers!"
"We are—Weapon Preservationists—the Bladekeepers!"
16.ability: Wearing the badge makes you one of them now
18.name: Weapon Break
18.description:
All weapons have durability limits, 
and since the user isn’t good at precise attacks.
there’s a risk of breaking them. But when the weapon does break —
it’ll land a powerful critical hit!
26.name: Swordsmanship Training
26.subtitle: true
26.description:
Sought advice from a swordmaster girl on how to get stronger
All she said was ‘Just swing your sword 1,000 times every day!’
—Will that really work!? Anyway, let’s give it a try...
26.ability:
Practice Swings Completed: \{\c[6]${QJ.MPMZ.tl.playerSwordsmanshipTraining(1)}\c[0]
Base attack damage of melee weapons increased by \c[6]${QJ.MPMZ.tl.playerSwordsmanshipTraining(2)}%
